name: Frieren
title: Elf Mage / Demon Slayer

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Ordinary Offensive Magic (Zoltraak) - Multi-Hit
basic.description: Frieren unleashes blasts of Zoltraak consecutively. Deals Water elemental damage.

core.name: Ordinary Offensive Magic (Zoltraak) - Concentrated
core.description: Frieren unleashes a blast of Zoltraak infused with concentrated mana power. Deals Water elemental damage.

skill.name: Destructive Lightning Magic (Judradjim)
skill.description: Frieren uses magic that unleashes destructive lightning. Deals Water elemental damage. When the final hit lands it inflicts the Airborne effect.

skill.name: Hellish Flame Magic (Vollzanbel)
skill.description: Frieren uses magic to unleash hellfire. Deals Water elemental damage. When the final hit lands it inflicts the Airborne effect.

support.name: Defense Magic
support.description: Frieren uses Defense Magic. If the entire team (excluding Sung Jinwoo) consists of Water team members, Sung Jinwoo's Attack and Defense increase by 15–20%. Grants [Defense Magic] effect on entire team: Shield equal to 20% of Frieren's Defense; Decreases damage taken by 5%. Duration: 30 seconds.

qte.name: Ordinary Offensive Magic (Zoltraak) - Penetration
qte.description: Frieren moves at high speed and unleashes a Zoltraak blast. Deals Water elemental damage. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, skills inflicting Stun or Bind, or a Shadow Skill. When this skill hits it inflicts the Airborne effect.

ultimate.name: Ordinary Offensive Magic (Zoltraak) - Ultimate
ultimate.description: Frieren releases mana power to unleash a massive Zoltraak blast. Deals Water elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the Airborne effect. Activates the [Mana Power Liberation] effect while active.

passive.name: Mana Power Control
passive.description: Stage 1, Stage 2, and Stage 3 of Ordinary Offensive Magic (Zoltraak) - Multi-Hit activate consecutively. Stage 3 activates Ordinary Offensive Magic (Zoltraak) - Concentrated once. [Mana Power Control] and [Defense Magic] effects activate when the user enters the stage. [Mana Power Control]: Increases user's Defense by 25%; When user has 50% or more MP, increases Defense by additional 25%; Skill Mana Consumption decreases by 20%; Duration: Infinite. [Mana Power Liberation]: Grants [Defense Magic] effect on entire team; Increases Critical Hit Rate by 100%; Removes [Mana Power Control] effect; When removed, [Mana Power Control] reactivates. Duration: Infinite. [Defense Magic]: Shield equal to 20% of Frieren's Defense; Decreases damage taken by 5%; Duration: 30 seconds.

advancements: When Ordinary Offensive Magic (Zoltraak) - Ultimate hits, removes target's Shield. When Defense Magic activates, instantly restores HP equal to 20% of Frieren's Defense to entire team (Cooldown: 10 seconds). When Destructive Lightning Magic (Judradjim) hits, activates [Paralyze] effect on target (3 seconds). When Hellish Flame Magic (Vollzanbel) hits, activates [Vollzanbel] effect: Defense -5%, Critical Hit chance +5%, Critical Hit damage taken +5%, damage taken from Frieren +35% (20 seconds).
The entire team's Attack, Defense, and HP increase by 9%.

[Mana Power Control] and [Defense Magic] effects are enhanced. Enhanced Mana Power Control: Defense +50%; At 50% MP, Defense +50%; Mana Consumption -30%; Duration: Infinite. Enhanced Defense Magic: Shield equal to 30% of Frieren's Defense; Damage taken -10%; Duration: 60 seconds.
The entire team's Critical Hit damage increases by 20%.

[Vollzanbel] effects are enhanced: Defense -10%, Critical Hit chance +15%, Critical Hit damage taken +15%, damage taken from Frieren +70% (30 seconds). Using Destructive Lightning Magic (Judradjim) restores 80% of the user's Power Gauge.
